<Note>
  **Under construction.** Documentation for the Console is being written. Check back soon or contact us if you need early access.
</Note>

The Console is the operator surface — a unified web dashboard for business, operations, and compliance teams to run an asset program day-to-day. It is where every Ryle product is operated: [issuance](/products/issuance), [confidential payments](/products/confidential-payments), [accounts & wallets](/products/accounts-and-wallets), and [compliance & disclosure](/products/compliance-and-disclosure).

## What you can do here

- Manage assets, supply, reserves, and reconciliation.
- Run mint and redeem operations with limits and approvals.
- Manage accounts, roles, and permissions.
- Configure policies, KYC, and the white-label wallet.
- Investigate activity and generate audit exports.
